net.openhft.chronicle.core.announcer

Class Announcer

  • java.lang.Object
    • net.openhft.chronicle.core.announcer.Announcer

  • public final class Announcer
extends Object
    Provides means for libraries to announce themselves.

    Announcements can be turned off buy setting the system property "chronicle.announcer.disable=true" prior to making any announcements.

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      static String LOGO

      All Methods Static Methods Concrete Methods

      static void announce(@NotNull String groupId, @NotNull String artifactId)
      Announces the given artifact whereby useful information is printed pertaining to the artifact in particular and the JVM i general.
      static void announce(@NotNull String groupId, @NotNull String artifactId, @NotNull Map<String,String> properties)
      Announces the given artifact whereby useful information is printed pertaining to the artifact in particular and the JVM i general accompanied by the provided properties.

        public static final String LOGO
        See Also:
        Constant Field Values

    • Method Detail

      • announce

        public static void announce(@NotNull
                            @NotNull String groupId,
                            @NotNull
                            @NotNull String artifactId)
        Announces the given artifact whereby useful information is printed pertaining to the artifact in particular and the JVM i general.

        An distinct artifact is only announced once per classloader and general JVM information is only printed once per classloader.

        Example: net.openhtf:chronicle-queue, net.openhft:chronicle-map and net.openhtf:chronicle-queue (again) is announced. This will produce:

        1. info on the JVM
        2. info on net.openhtf:chronicle-queue
        3. info on net.openhtf:chronicle-map
        Parameters:
        groupId - name of the group (e.g. net.openhft)
        artifactId - name of the library (e.g. chronicle-queue)

      • announce

        public static void announce(@NotNull
                            @NotNull String groupId,
                            @NotNull
                            @NotNull String artifactId,
                            @NotNull
                            @NotNull Map<String,String> properties)
        Announces the given artifact whereby useful information is printed pertaining to the artifact in particular and the JVM i general accompanied by the provided properties.

        The artifact will be announced on each invocation provided that the given properties is A) not empty or B) only contains a key "logo", for which only one announcement per class loader is made.

        Parameters:
        groupId - name of the group (e.g. net.openhft)
        artifactId - name of the library (e.g. chronicle-queue)
        properties - to print
        See Also:
        LOGO
